results.title: Restaurant Review: Solaya, London - Business Traveller
results.content:
We opted for an elevated version of lamb parmentier – akin to a fancy shepherd’s pie – topped with delightfully crunchy kale and colourful carrots, and the (very large) half chicken bourguignon. The latter came swimming in a sauce so good you could drink it: slightly sweeter than you’d expect of a bourguignon and enriched with smoked pancetta and shimeji mushrooms.

Solaya’s slight let-down is its desserts. If you’re claiming French cuisine, punters will expect a strong sweets game. While the menu sounds appetising, the execution doesn’t quite deliver. Our apple tart, for example – a pastry disc topped with thin slices of caramelised apple and a dollop of ice cream – had a soggy base and disappointingly chewy texture overall. [...] Nevertheless, you’ll likely be so full after your mains that dessert may not be warranted anyway.

Business Traveller
Business Traveller

### Service

Immediately upon entering Solaya, you’re made to feel welcome. Staff exude what feels like genuine warmth and seem to be around whenever you need them. It’s a slick operation, despite having only opened in September. 

an apple tart with vanilla ice cream on top, served at London restaurant Solaya
an apple tart with vanilla ice cream on top, served at London restaurant Solaya

### Verdict [...] ### Verdict

Solaya is a strong addition to Hoxton’s dining scene thanks to its striking setting, comforting dishes and great service. While it likely won’t win Atkinson any more Michelin stars (there’s little innovation to be found), it’s a worthy stop if you’re in this part of town or staying at the art-inspired hotel in which it sits. 

Business Traveller
Business Traveller

Best for Business lunches or dinner dates where you want to impress your guests but remain relaxed.

Don’t miss The chicken bourguignon (the sauce!) and eye-popping urban views.

Price Small plates from £6; main plates from £22.

Find it… On the 25th Floor of art’otel London Hoxton; 1-3 Rivington St, London EC2A 3DT; solayalondon.com
